mano_cua.result_summary: 字体切换功能正常。Font下拉提供Inter/Manrope/System三个选项，切换后class正确应用到html元素(font-manrope/font-inter)，Manrope字体成功加载(document.fonts.check返回true)，Inter和Manrope视觉渲染有明显字形差异。Update preferences保存正常。getComputedStyle确认font-family为'Manrope, "sans-serif"'。页面文字未回退到默认无衬线字体
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Font switching works correctly. Font selector offers Inter/Manrope/System. After selecting Manrope and saving, html element class becomes 'dark font-manrope'. document.fonts.check('1em Manrope') returns true. getComputedStyle(document.body).fontFamily returns 'Manrope, "sans-serif"'. Visual comparison between Inter and Manrope shows distinct glyph differences. No fallback to default sans-serif observed.
